items.name: FM 17-30 Tank Platoon
items.extraction_note: Platoon-level training, spacing, movement, and crew coordination anchor.

items.name: FM 17-33 Tank Battalion, Light and Medium
source: FM 17-33 The Tank Battalion, Light and Medium
items.extraction_note: Battalion-role manual emphasizing that tanks served many roles, not just anti-tank duels.

items.name: FM 18-5 Tank Destroyer Unit
source: FM 18-5 Tactical Employment: Tank Destroyer Unit
items.extraction_note: Reserve/ambush doctrine for tank destroyers, later softened in practice.

items.name: Combined arms training
items.extraction_note: Training and preparation blended infantry, armor, artillery, and air support.

items.name: Signal communication
source: FM 24-5 Basic Field Manual, Signal Communication
items.extraction_note: Message forms and signal discipline create the structure that reports move through.
